question.text: Under Regulation 3(1) of SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015, an insider may communicate UPSI only when such communication is in furtherance of:

answer.text: Legitimate purposes, performance of duties, or discharge of legal obligations
Information sharing with all connected persons
Any purpose approved by the compliance officer

explanation.text: **The Logic:** As per Regulation 3(1), communication of UPSI is permitted only in furtherance of legitimate purposes, performance of duties, or discharge of legal obligations. **The Trap:** Approval by compliance officer is not a sufficient condition for communication of UPSI. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** 'Legitimate purpose' has been further defined to include sharing with partners, lenders, advisors etc., provided it is not to evade the regulations.
